news.summary: In Milton Keynes, England, Teletrac Navman, a prominent connected mobility platform under Vontier, has released the Mobilizing the Future of Fleets Report: 2025 Energy Edition. The report reveals that 63% of fleets attribute customer demand as a significant factor influencing their switch to alternative energies and the pace at which they make this transition. Furthermore, over half (58%) of surveyed businesses identify their brand reputation and sustainability objectives as key drivers in this shift.
news.headline: Teletrac Navman report reveals 63% of fleets cite customer demand for energy transition; 58% prioritize brand reputation/sustainability.

news.summary: Chinese autonomous vehicle technology company Pony AI Inc. (NASDAQ: PONY) has seen a significant increase in its stock price, rising by 315% in the past month due to recent positive developments. The company announced its partnership with Uber Technologies Inc. (NYSE: UBER) during its first quarter earnings call. This partnership will bring Pony’s robotaxi platform to international markets, starting in the Middle East later this year. Pony AI is expanding globally, with a Level 4 robotaxi testing permit already secured in Luxembourg and road testing initiated in Seoul's Gangnam District. CEO James Peng highlighted the goal of scaling deployments to additional international markets in the future. Pony AI is making strides outside its home base in China and is attracting attention from investors.
news.headline: Pony.ai stock surges 315% on Uber deal and global expansion; aims to launch robotaxi platform in Middle East.

news.summary: In Toronto, Generation Mining Limited (TSX: GENM, OTCQB: GENMF) has obtained the necessary permit to proceed with constructing the Marathon Copper-Palladium Project in Northwestern Ontario. This milestone allows the company to manage and discharge water for the project.

news.summary: Noted crypto and AI advisor to President Donald Trump, David Sacks, is optimistic about the potential economic impact of upcoming stablecoin legislation. Sacks predicts that providing a legal framework for the current $200 billion in unregulated stablecoins could result in unlocking trillions for the U.S. Treasury. He highlighted bipartisan support for the legislation being discussed in the Senate, indicating that establishing clear regulations could lead to a surge in demand for U.S. Treasuries. Sacks mentioned in a recent CNBC report that the GENIUS Act, aimed at regulating stablecoins, has successfully passed a significant procedural vote in the Senate with backing from 15 Democrats. The bill now holds enough votes to progress further in the legislative process. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: David Sacks, Trump's top crypto advisor, predicts stablecoin bill could generate trillions for US Treasury. $200 billion worth of stablecoins could lead to high demand for Treasuries. GENIUS Act, regulating stablecoins, passes crucial Senate vote.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency market surged by 2.5% on May 22, surpassing a total market capitalization of $3.48 trillion for the first time since February. Bitcoin hit a new all-time high of $111,888, spurring investor confidence and leading major altcoins like Ether, Cardano, and Solana to follow suit. The market was buoyed by easing trade tensions between the US and China, as well as Moody's downgrade of the US debt rating, prompting investors to turn to Bitcoin as a safe haven asset. Additionally, traditional financial firms like JPMorgan Chase showing interest in crypto has further fueled the market's gains. A wave of short liquidations worth over $495 million, with $300 million from short positions, also contributed to the rally. The article highlights that while the market is currently testing resistance at $3.5 trillion, a significant move above this level could accelerate the bullish momentum towards $3.84 trillion. It advises readers to conduct their own research before making any investment decisions.
news.headline: The crypto market is up 2.5% on May 22, with its capitalization surpassing $3.48 trillion for the first time since February. Bitcoin hits a new all-time high of $111,888, boosting investor confidence. Market performance today driven by BTC's highs and easing trade tension. Investors turn to Bitcoin as a store of value amid USD downtrend. Short liquidations of $495 million in 24 hours trigger rally, with $300 million in short positions. TOTAL market cap tests $3.5 trillion level, potentially heading towards $3.84 trillion target. Bulls momentum increases as RSI hits 70, with potential breakout if volume persists.

news.summary: AI agents powered by ChatGPT are revolutionizing trading tasks by automating processes through natural language prompts and API integrations, enhancing speed and consistency. These agents serve as support tools rather than fully autonomous systems, requiring real-time data and manual oversight to avoid failures due to over-reliance. Regulatory scrutiny on AI in trading is intensifying to ensure transparency and compliance. In the crypto market, ChatGPT-enabled AI agents interpret instructions in plain English to monitor prices, analyze trends, and execute trades automatically. Although successful cases exist, caution is necessary as the technology still has limitations especially without real-time data access. Notable figures include a profit of $6,500 by a user leveraging ChatGPT for technical analysis and a scam resulting in a collective loss of $17,240 due to a fraudulent ChatGPT-based trading bot tutorial. AI provides benefits like swift trade execution and unbiased decision-making; however, challenges such as reliance on clear instructions, security risks, latency, and compliance monitoring persist. Ethical and regulatory implications of AI in trading, including accountability for harmful trades and potential market manipulation, are being studied by financial authorities globally. New frameworks aim to ensure ethical use and compliance in the AI-driven financial sector.
news.headline: AI-powered agents using ChatGPT automate crypto trading tasks with speed and consistency. Regulatory focus increases on AI transparency and compliance in trading.

news.summary: CorVel Corporation (NASDAQ: CRVL) reported its financial results for the quarter and fiscal year that ended on March 31, 2025. In the quarter, revenues reached $232 million, marking an increase from $207 million in the same period of 2024. Earnings per share for the quarter stood at $0.51, up from $0.37 year-over-year. For the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025, revenues totaled $896 million, surpassing the $795 million recorded in the prior fiscal year. Earnings per share for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025 were $1.83, an increase from $1.47 reported in the fiscal year that ended on March 31, 2024. Notably, the earnings per share figures for both years have been adjusted to account for the three-for-one stock split of common stock that occurred on December 24, 2024.
news.headline: CorVel Corp's Q1 revenues reached $232M, up from $207M in 2024; earnings per share were $0.51 vs $0.37. Annual revenues hit $896M, up from $795M in 2024; earnings per share were $1.83 vs $1.47. Adjusted EPS due to Dec 24, 2024, stock split.

news.summary: TD Bank Group reported its earnings for the second quarter ended April 30, 2025. Reported net income was $11.1 billion, up 334% compared to the same period last year, with adjusted net income at $3.6 billion, down 4%. Diluted earnings per share were $6.27 compared to $1.35 last year, and adjusted diluted earnings per share were $1.97 compared to $2.04. For the six months ended April 30, reported net income was $13.9 billion, up from $5.4 billion, and adjusted net income was $7.2 billion, down from $7.4 billion. TD Bank's Strategic Review includes adjusting business mix and capital allocation, simplifying portfolios, evolving operations, and driving innovation for efficiency. The Bank will update on its medium-term financial targets in the later part of 2025.
news.headline: TD Bank Group reported Q2 2025 results: net income $11.1B (334% increase YoY), adjusted net income $3.6B (4% decrease). Diluted earnings per share: $6.27, adjusted $1.97. Reported revenue $22.9B, net interest income $8.1B. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: A joint report from Binance Pay and Travala revealed that travelers using cryptocurrency for booking arrangements spend more than double the amount of regular travelers using fiat money. Crypto-based bookings on Travala reached $80 million in 2024, up from $45 million the year before, with crypto travelers spending an average of $1,211 per transaction compared to $469 by fiat users. Crypto users were also shown to be three times more valuable over their lifetime due to longer stays and higher repeat bookings. The report highlighted that crypto users were 57% more likely to make a repeat hotel purchase. The main draw for using crypto for travel was its borderless, global utility, allowing travelers to avoid currency exchange lines and foreign transaction fees. Airlines integrating digital currencies into their booking systems saw a 40% boost in bookings, with travel and hospitality representing 14% of all crypto transactions in 2024. Travala, founded in 2017, enables users to pay for flights, hotel stays, and tours with 141 different cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and USDC via Binance Pay. The growth in crypto ownership at a compound annual rate of 99% far outpaced traditional payment methods' growth, with 65% of crypto owners expressing interest in using it for payments. As the crypto holder base expands, more retailers are accepting digital currencies for everyday transactions, with examples ranging from luxury goods to fast food outlets. Payments with Binance Pay are confirmed within seconds due to its off-chain, closed-loop payment solution, avoiding extended delays and network fees associated with some other methods.
news.headline: Crypto travelers spend 2.5x more ($1,211 avg) than fiat, totaling $80M in 2024 on Travala. They bring 3x greater lifetime value.
